title: How to Run a Temperature Mapping Study
alt: Five-step warehouse temperature mapping process from protocol to requalification

items.label: Write the protocol
items.desc: Define objective, acceptance criteria and QRM-based sensor rationale

items.label: Place sensors
items.desc: Target hot and cold spots; map empty and loaded states

items.label: Calibrate and log
items.desc: Traceable calibrated loggers; full ALCOA+ data integrity

items.label: Interpret and act
items.desc: Report min, max, mean; investigate excursions and apply CAPA

items.label: Requalify on change
items.desc: Re-map at risk-based intervals and via change control
